deviations.description: The process model enforces that anesthesia is applied immediately after patient preparation, as shown in the process flow on page 1 of the PDF. Version 2 of the requirement relaxes this constraint, allowing anesthesia to be applied at any point after patient preparation. The process unnecessarily restricts the timing of anesthesia application, continuing to enforce the outdated 'immediately after' constraint.

The change in activity labels from 'prepare_patient' and 'apply_anesthesia' to 'patient preparation' and 'anesthesia' does not affect compliance, as the process model activities clearly correspond to the intended actions and there is no substantive change in the process semantics.
